scenario_meta.world_name: RPG Guild Main Character At-Will LongLive Test
scenario_meta.description: A Japanese fantasy RPG guild with 100 regular members and three always-active protagonists. This run removes predefined video task routes and forces protagonist activities to use freeform model-selected LongLive cinematic interactions.
scenario_meta.simulation_objective: Run 103 agents for 25 rounds at activation 0.15. The three protagonists activate every round and each protagonist activity must open LongLive; other activated agents may also use freeform at-will LongLive, with a 10-video-per-round cap. No predefined video task routes are available.

extra_world_events.title: Urgent Commission: Goblin Raid on Trade Route
extra_world_events.description: A merchant caravan was ambushed near the Whispering Woods. The guild needs a strike team to clear the goblin camp and recover the stolen goods.

extra_world_events.title: Unidentified Glowing Relic
extra_world_events.description: A scout returned with a strange glowing stone pulsating with ancient magic. It has been placed in the library for identification.

extra_world_events.title: Nervous Rookie Struggles with Form
extra_world_events.description: A newly recruited adventurer is struggling to hold their shield correctly in the training yard, looking around anxiously for guidance.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Potion Crate
extra_world_events.description: A stack of minor healing and mana potions tumbled over in the warehouse. A strange, colorful mist is rising from the mixed puddles.

extra_world_events.title: Strike Team Assembled: Goblin Raid
extra_world_events.description: A vanguard has been rallied for the Whispering Woods goblin camp. The party now needs final supply checks and gear repairs at the strategy table before departing.

extra_world_events.title: Relic Reacts to Royal Blood
extra_world_events.description: The glowing stone in the library began humming loudly when Celestia approached it. The scholars are scrambling to document the magical resonance and require assistance.

extra_world_events.title: Tavern Dispute over Premium Rations
extra_world_events.description: Two adventuring parties in the tavern are arguing loudly over who gets the last batch of high-grade stamina rations for their upcoming commissions.

extra_world_events.title: Cracked Shield Delays Forge Queue
extra_world_events.description: The nervous rookie cracked their shield during training and is now holding up the forge queue, delaying final preparations for the goblin strike team.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Strike Team Departs
extra_world_events.description: The cracked shield bottleneck is resolved. The vanguard is fully equipped and gathering at the Guild Hall doors for final buffs before marching to the Whispering Woods.

extra_world_events.title: Decoding the Royal Relic
extra_world_events.description: Scholars stabilized the humming relic but need to cross-reference its magical signature with ancient royal lineage texts. Assistance is required to decode the resonance.

extra_world_events.title: Missing Quest Completion Stamp
extra_world_events.description: A returning party is trying to submit their clearance report, but the official guild stamp is missing from the quest board desk, causing a bottleneck.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Mana Flicker in Dorms
extra_world_events.description: A lingering magical effect from the warehouse spill has caused the dormitory lights to flicker in strange colors, spooking resting members.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Strike Team Returns Victorious
extra_world_events.description: The vanguard has returned from the Whispering Woods with the stolen goods. They are gathering in the tavern to celebrate and await official bounty verification.

extra_world_events.title: Royal Relic Coordinates Decoded
extra_world_events.description: Scholars successfully translated the relic's resonance, revealing a map to a sealed royal vault. The guild needs to coordinate an expedition at the strategy table.

extra_world_events.title: Goblin Bounty Payout and Archival
extra_world_events.description: The Guild Cadre is finalizing the paperwork for the Whispering Woods raid. The vanguard is lining up at the quest board to receive their pay and officially archive the commission.

extra_world_events.title: Royal Vault Expedition Departs
extra_world_events.description: A specialized party has been formed to investigate the sealed royal vault. They are gathering supplies at the warehouse before departing to uncover the relic's ancient secrets.

extra_world_events.title: Royal Vault Scout Returns
extra_world_events.description: A scout from the royal vault expedition has rushed back to the strategy table, reporting a magical seal that requires specialized arcane tools to breach.

extra_world_events.title: New Commission: Missing Caravan
extra_world_events.description: An urgent commission has been posted on the quest board. A merchant caravan carrying vital forge supplies has gone missing near the mountain pass.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Arcane Charges
extra_world_events.description: A crate of arcane breaching tools meant for the Royal Vault expedition spilled in the warehouse, creating a localized zero-gravity hazard.

extra_world_events.title: Injured Familiar in Training
extra_world_events.description: A novice's makeshift weapon shattered in the training yard due to the forge supply shortage, lightly injuring their summoned familiar.

extra_world_events.title: Arcane Breaching Tools Secured
extra_world_events.description: The zero-gravity spill in the warehouse is contained. The arcane breaching tools are now distributed to the Royal Vault expedition team so they can break the magical seal.

extra_world_events.title: Caravan Rescue Team Departs
extra_world_events.description: A rescue party has formed to find the missing merchant caravan and secure the delayed forge supplies. They are gathering at the Guild Hall for final coordination.

extra_world_events.title: Makeshift Repair Mishap
extra_world_events.description: With forge supplies delayed by the missing caravan, a makeshift weapon repair has sparked a small, stubborn magical fire in the workshop.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Vault Seal Debate
extra_world_events.description: Scholars in the library are loudly arguing over alternative ways to break the Royal Vault seal, disturbing members trying to study spellwork.

extra_world_events.title: Vault Seal Breached
extra_world_events.description: The expedition successfully used the arcane tools to breach the Royal Vault seal. They have returned with an ancient codex that needs immediate translation.

extra_world_events.title: Caravan Rescued, Supplies Arrive
extra_world_events.description: The rescue party has returned with the missing caravan. Fresh supplies are being unloaded at the forge, finally ending the material shortage and allowing proper repairs.

extra_world_events.title: Codex Translated: Hidden Treasure Map
extra_world_events.description: The ancient codex recovered from the Royal Vault has been translated, revealing a map to a forgotten treasure. The guild is gathering at the strategy table to inspect the route.

extra_world_events.title: Caravan Rescue Celebration and Payout
extra_world_events.description: With the forge fully restocked, the caravan rescue team is receiving their bounty. A lively celebration has broken out in the tavern corner to honor the successful mission.

extra_world_events.title: Treasure Expedition Departs
extra_world_events.description: A specialized team has been recruited using the translated codex map. They are gathering final provisions at the warehouse before departing for the ruins.

extra_world_events.title: New Commission: Healer Escort
extra_world_events.description: An urgent commission has been posted. A nearby village requires a skilled healer and an armed escort to deal with an outbreak of strange beast attacks.

extra_world_events.title: Nervous Rookie Drops Rations
extra_world_events.description: A novice packing for the urgent healer escort mission slipped in the dormitory, scattering their prepared rations and creating a mess.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Mana Flicker in Training
extra_world_events.description: A sudden, strange mana flicker in the training yard distracted several sparring members, causing minor bruises and interrupting practice.

extra_world_events.title: Healer Escort Party Formed
extra_world_events.description: An escort party has been successfully recruited for the urgent village commission. They are currently gathering at the infirmary to brief the assigned healer before departing.

extra_world_events.title: Treasure Ruins Scout Report
extra_world_events.description: A swift scout from the treasure expedition has returned to the strategy table, reporting that the target ruins are heavily trapped and requesting specialized arcane support.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Scout Notes
extra_world_events.description: A scout returning from the trapped ruins dropped their supplementary trap notes in the bustling guild hall, causing confusion among the reinforcement teams trying to prepare.

extra_world_events.title: Agitated Healer Familiar
extra_world_events.description: The assigned healer's magical familiar is agitated by the urgent departure preparations, knocking over minor supplies and causing a scene in the tavern corner.

extra_world_events.title: Healer Escort Departs
extra_world_events.description: The healer escort party has finalized their briefing and is now gathering at the guild hall doors to depart for the village. They are doing a final gear check.

extra_world_events.title: Arcane Support Recruited for Ruins
extra_world_events.description: Specialized mages are gathering in the arcane library to research the specific magical traps reported by the treasure expedition scout before deploying as backup.

extra_world_events.title: Misplaced Potion Crate
extra_world_events.description: A crate of specialized antidotes meant for the departing healer escort was accidentally buried under iron ore in the warehouse, delaying the final gear check.

extra_world_events.title: Minor Illusion Mishap
extra_world_events.description: While researching the ruins' traps, a mage accidentally triggered a lingering illusion spell, filling the library with harmless but distracting phantom sparks.

extra_world_events.title: Healer Escort Arrival Report
extra_world_events.description: A messenger bird arrived at the strategy table confirming the healer escort safely reached the village. They are treating the wounded while preparing to track the beasts.

extra_world_events.title: Arcane Counter-Measures Forged
extra_world_events.description: Using the research from the library, the arcane backup team is now at the forge workshop, enchanting specialized tools to safely disarm the traps at the treasure ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Startled Apprentice Drops Ores
extra_world_events.description: The loud crackle of the new arcane trap-disarming tools being enchanted startled a nearby apprentice, causing them to drop a heavy crate of rare ores and blocking the anvil.

extra_world_events.title: Stubborn Messenger Bird
extra_world_events.description: The messenger bird that delivered the healer escort's report is exhausted and stubbornly roosting on the main strategy map, refusing to let anyone inspect the region.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Lair Strike Request
extra_world_events.description: The healer escort team tracked the beasts to their lair and posted an urgent request for a combat strike team to assist in the final clearance.

extra_world_events.title: Arcane Backup Departs
extra_world_events.description: Equipped with newly forged counter-measures, the arcane backup team is gathering at the guild hall doors, ready to depart for the trapped treasure ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Nervous Rookie's Armor Trouble
extra_world_events.description: A novice adventurer eager to join the newly posted beast lair strike team is struggling to properly secure their heavy armor plating in the training yard.

extra_world_events.title: Lingering Arcane Ozone
extra_world_events.description: The recent enchantment of trap-disarming tools has left a strange, crackling mana scent drifting into the tavern corner, making patrons' drinks taste slightly metallic.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Lair Strike Team Assembled
extra_world_events.description: The strike team requested by the healer escort has formed. They are currently gathered at the strategy table to review the beast lair's location before moving out.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Ruins Artifact Delivered
extra_world_events.description: A courier just delivered a humming artifact recovered by the arcane backup team after disarming the first trap at the ruins. It sits in the arcane library awaiting identification.

extra_world_events.title: Strike Team Role Dispute
extra_world_events.description: Two members of the newly formed beast lair strike team are arguing in the guild hall over who should take the vanguard position, threatening to delay their departure.

extra_world_events.title: Artifact's Sleepy Aura
extra_world_events.description: The humming artifact in the library is emitting a soothing magical pulse that is causing members resting in the nearby dormitory to fall into an unnaturally deep slumber.

extra_world_events.title: Strike Team Supply Run
extra_world_events.description: With the vanguard dispute settled, the beast lair strike team is now at the warehouse requisitioning heavy rations and healing potions for their imminent departure.

extra_world_events.title: Artifact Aura Neutralization
extra_world_events.description: Scholars have identified the humming ruins artifact. They are now preparing a containment ritual in the library to suppress its sleep-inducing aura so it can be safely studied.

extra_world_events.title: Clumsy Medic Drops Potions
extra_world_events.description: In the rush to supply the departing strike team, a junior medic dropped a crate of minor healing potions in the infirmary, creating a sticky, sweet-smelling mess.

extra_world_events.title: Disoriented Mana Hound
extra_world_events.description: The magical backwash from the library's artifact containment ritual has confused a member's mana hound, which is now hiding under a table in the tavern corner and growling at shadows.

extra_world_events.title: Strike Team Departs
extra_world_events.description: Fully supplied and briefed, the beast lair strike team is finally marching out through the guild hall doors to assist the healers.

extra_world_events.title: Artifact Secret Revealed
extra_world_events.description: The containment ritual succeeded. The artifact has opened, revealing an ancient map fragment pointing to a deeper level of the ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Misread Map Fragment
extra_world_events.description: A novice adventurer is trying to copy the newly discovered ruins map fragment onto the quest board, but is holding it upside down, causing mass confusion.

extra_world_events.title: Potion Sprite Swarm
extra_world_events.description: The sweet-smelling spilled potions in the infirmary have attracted a swarm of mischievous healing sprites, who are now playfully hiding the remaining bandages.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Lair Scout Returns
extra_world_events.description: A swift-footed scout from the strike team has returned to the strategy table, reporting that the beast lair has a secondary entrance requiring specialized explosives.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins Expedition Posted
extra_world_events.description: The corrected map fragment has been officially pinned to the quest board. The guild is now actively recruiting a specialized party to delve into the newly discovered deeper ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Nervous Rookie Mishandles Explosives
extra_world_events.description: A nervous rookie at the forge is trembling while packing the specialized explosives requested by the beast lair scout, risking an accidental detonation.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Rumor of Ruins Curse
extra_world_events.description: A veteran adventurer in the tavern corner is loudly claiming that the newly posted deep ruins map is cursed, causing hesitation among potential recruits.

extra_world_events.title: Explosives Delivery Dispatched
extra_world_events.description: The specialized explosives have been safely packed at the forge. A fast-response courier team is now rushing them out the guild hall to the beast lair strike team.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins Party Formed
extra_world_events.description: Overcoming the tavern rumors, a brave party has formed for the Deep Ruins expedition. They are gathering at the strategy table to finalize their approach.

extra_world_events.title: Shattered Practice Dummy
extra_world_events.description: An overzealous recruit practicing for the deep ruins expedition completely shattered a masterwork practice dummy in the training yard, scattering splinters everywhere.

extra_world_events.title: Strange Mana Flicker
extra_world_events.description: Residual magic from the recent artifact ritual is causing the arcane library's lights to flicker wildly, making it difficult for the deep ruins party to double-check their spellwork.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Lair Breached
extra_world_events.description: A magical message bird arrived at the guild hall confirming the explosives worked. The strike team breached the secondary entrance and is now clearing the lair.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins Party Requisition
extra_world_events.description: The newly formed Deep Ruins expedition is crowding the supply warehouse, demanding extra potions and rations to survive the rumored curses below.

extra_world_events.title: Missing Quest Stamp
extra_world_events.description: The official guild stamp required to authorize backup missions for the Beast Lair has gone missing, halting new quest approvals.

extra_world_events.title: Injured Scout Familiar
extra_world_events.description: A small avian familiar has fluttered into the infirmary with singed wings, carrying an early warning about magical traps in the Deep Ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Lair Cleared
extra_world_events.description: The strike team has returned victorious from the Beast Lair. They are celebrating their success in the tavern corner, though some need healing.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins Party Departs
extra_world_events.description: Fully supplied and warned of magical traps, the Deep Ruins expedition party is gathering at the guild hall doors to finally depart.

extra_world_events.title: Spilled Potion Crate
extra_world_events.description: In the rush to supply the departing Deep Ruins expedition, a crate of minor healing potions was knocked over in the warehouse, creating a sticky, glowing mess.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Loot Dispute
extra_world_events.description: Two exhausted members of the victorious Beast Lair strike team are loudly arguing in the dormitory over who deserves the rare beast core they recovered.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Core Appraisal
extra_world_events.description: The disputed rare beast core from the cleared lair has been brought to the forge for official guild appraisal and processing.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins First Report
extra_world_events.description: A fast scout from the Deep Ruins expedition has returned to the strategy table with a rough map of the first floor's magical traps.

extra_world_events.title: Nervous Rookie Volunteer
extra_world_events.description: A novice adventurer is hovering anxiously by the quest board, intimidated by the new trap reports but eager to volunteer for the Deep Ruins backup squad.

extra_world_events.title: Overheating Beast Core
extra_world_events.description: The rare beast core being appraised at the forge is suddenly emitting intense heat, threatening to melt nearby tools if not properly stabilized with magic.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Core Stabilized
extra_world_events.description: The overheating beast core has been successfully stabilized with arcane wards. It is now ready to be forged into a powerful new guild weapon.

extra_world_events.title: Deep Ruins Backup Formed
extra_world_events.description: Following the scout's trap report, a backup squad including eager rookies has been officially formed and is reviewing the map before deployment.

extra_world_events.title: Ration Shortage for Backup Squad
extra_world_events.description: The kitchen is overwhelmed trying to prepare specialized iron-rations for the newly formed Deep Ruins backup squad, causing a supply bottleneck.

extra_world_events.title: Glowing Arcane Texts
extra_world_events.description: Residual mana from the newly stabilized beast core has drifted into the library, causing several old spellbooks to float and glow with unknown runes.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Core Weapon Forged
extra_world_events.description: The stabilized beast core has been successfully forged into a powerful new guild weapon. It awaits final inspection and assignment to a worthy adventurer.

extra_world_events.title: Backup Squad Departs
extra_world_events.description: With rations finally secured and maps memorized, the Deep Ruins backup squad marches out of the guild hall to support the main expedition.

extra_world_events.title: Clumsy Practice Injury
extra_world_events.description: An overeager novice sprained their wrist in the training yard trying to mimic the fighting style suited for the newly forged beast core weapon.

extra_world_events.title: Hidden Map Discovered
extra_world_events.description: While organizing the glowing spellbooks, a scholar found an old, brittle map detailing a forgotten shortcut in the Deep Ruins.

extra_world_events.title: Beast Weapon Assignment
extra_world_events.description: The newly forged beast core weapon is ready for field testing. The guild cadre must assign it to a capable hero before the next major commission.

extra_world_events.title: Shortcut Map Verification
extra_world_events.description: The brittle map found in the library has been brought to the strategy table to see if it can help the deployed backup squad bypass the traps.

extra_world_events.title: Stubborn Courier Bat
extra_world_events.description: A messenger bat meant to deliver the newly verified shortcut map to the backup squad is hiding among the crates, refusing to fly.

extra_world_events.title: Loud Weapon Boast
extra_world_events.description: A veteran adventurer is loudly boasting that they are the only one capable of wielding the new beast core weapon without getting burned.
